name: Gabimaru WhatsApp Bot
description: Spider-Venom Symbiote Edition WhatsApp Bot — Heroku Ready

APP_URL.description: Your Heroku app URL (e.g. https://your-app.herokuapp.com). Used for keepalive pings.

GROQ_API_KEY.description: Groq AI API key for chatbot feature. Get at https://console.groq.com

SESSION_SECRET.description: Secret key for web session security. Use a long random string.
